description: Perform a Menu Engineering analysis in WPS Spreadsheet using the data in /home/ga/Documents/menu_sales_data.xlsx. On the 'POS_Export' sheet, calculate Unit_CM (Column F), Total_Revenue (Column G), and Total_CM (Column H). Determine the benchmark averages for Qty_Sold in cell J2 and Unit_CM in cell K2. Use these benchmarks to classify each item in Column I into one of four categories: 'Star' (Qty_Sold and Unit_CM both >= average), 'Plowhorse' (Qty_Sold >= average, Unit_CM < average), 'Puzzle' (Qty_Sold < average, Unit_CM >= average), or 'Dog' (both < average). Create a new sheet named 'Summary' that displays the total count of items for each of the four classifications. Save the updated workbook.
